sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: ingestor daemon hardening (resilient poll loop + heartbeat/watchdog healthcheck + bounded league re-admission) in apps/ingestor/src plus deploy/production/docker-compose.yml and tests. Merge SHA binds at lane close.

pnpm_verify.note: env:check, lint, type-check (project references), build, and the full unit suite all green — '[verify:parallel] all checks passed'.

lint.note: 0 errors, 0 warnings after removing an unused eslint-disable.

cases: FIX #1: a transient cycle-level DB failure does not kill the daemon loop (reproduces the 521 outage; loop resolves instead of rejecting)
FIX #1: the heartbeat hook throwing never breaks the loop
FIX #3: a timed-out league held past the re-admission bound is re-admitted
runHealthcheck exits 0 on a fresh heartbeat and 1 when stale (process alive, loop wedged)
evaluateHeartbeatLiveness fresh/stale/missing + env-override resolution + write/read round-trip

regression.note: singleton 4/4 (leagueInFlight changed boolean -> timestamped map) + ingestor 86/86.

live_db_smoke.note: Executed pnpm test:db against live Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm — 7/7 pass (database-smoke.test.ts, ~114s). Read-only; the ingestor daemon-hardening change adds no schema and no new writes.

runtime_proof.command: live read-only prod verification (Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm) + focused reproduction tests
runtime_proof.note: The durability fix is proven by the reproduction tests (the loop survives the exact cycle-level 521 failure that caused the 5.5h outage). The live recovery path the watchdog now automates was confirmed read-only on prod after the 22:26 UTC operational restart: the funnel resumed flowing end-to-end. Full post-deploy assertion (one container, loop advances, transient-failure survival, MLB resumes) follows merge + deploy.

queries.description: Reproduction: a cycle-level DB throw (events.listStartedBySnapshot = 521) no longer kills the loop
queries.result_summary: runIngestorCycles resolves (loop survives), POLL ITERATION FAILED telemetry logged per cycle, heartbeat advanced cycles 1 and 2 — PASS

queries.description: Healthcheck fails on a stale heartbeat even though the node process is alive
queries.result_summary: fresh heartbeat -> exit 0; stale heartbeat -> exit 1; missing -> exit 1 — PASS

queries.description: Live recovery: fresh MLB provider offers advancing after restart (read-only prod)
queries.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_offer_history WHERE snapshot_at >= now()-interval '10 minutes' AND sport_key ILIKE '%MLB%'
queries.result_summary: 2000+ fresh MLB provider_offer_history rows / 10 min; provider_offer_current advancing in real-time

queries.description: Live recovery: qualified candidates + picks flowing again (read-only prod, 22:58 UTC)
queries.sql: SELECT status, count(*) FROM pick_candidates WHERE created_at >= now()-interval '30 min' GROUP BY status
queries.result_summary: 446 candidates / 30 min — 390 qualified, 56 rejected (stale_price_data 23, unsupported_market_family 25, invalid_odds 8); 51 picks created / 30 min

row_counts.note: 390 qualified — earlier 0-qualified was post-restart catch-up, now cleared
funnel flows past the previous candidate->qualified NO
picks created from fresh MLB candidates

live_production_proof.observed: Operational restart at 22:26 UTC reaped 7 HUNG_SINGLETON runs and resumed cycling NBA/NFL/MLB; the funnel flowed end-to-end again (offers -> market_universe -> 390 qualified candidates -> 51 picks). This is the recovery the in-process watchdog now automates without manual intervention.
live_production_proof.deferred: Full post-deploy proof (exactly one ingestor container; loop advances; simulated/observed transient DB failure does not kill the loop; healthcheck reflects loop progress; MLB offer-ingest resumes after failure/timeout) runs after this PR is merged and deployed.
live_production_proof.production_mutation: none beyond a container restart (operational recovery); no data backfill, no fabricated picks
